manipulators.description: Hyper+p → Toggle between last used tabs (CLUT)
Hyper+t → Move tab to new window (requires extension)
Hyper+\ = import {} with cursor inside braces
Cmd+open_bracket = ={} React prop with cursor inside

rules.description: Hyper Quick Launch - AI & Dev Tools
Shift + F6 to low power mode with notification

to.shell_command: current_status=$(pmset -g | awk '/lowpowermode/ {print $NF}'); new_status=$((1 - current_status)); sudo pmset -a lowpowermode $new_status; osascript -e 'display notification "Low Power Mode is now toggled"'

manipulators.description: option + m = delete to start of line
option + n = delete to end of line
option + command + h = select word left (not VSCode)
option + command + l = select word right
command + i = select to start of line
command + o = select to end of line
